steps.t: The hare's den lies along the cliff running along the south-west edge of the Circle of Blood. Radagast has asked you to coax a rabbit to safety, teach…
Radagast is at Barad Dhorn in Agamaur. Radagast has asked you to coax a rabbit to safety, teaching you the importance of the bond with the gentler cre…
Radagast the Brown is at Barad Dhorn. You have safely brought the Hare back to Radagast. You should speak to Radagast to see what else he might ask of…
